name: G-10 index generation: per-file metadata in INDEX.md surfaces authoritative_publisher so operators can scan provenance at a glance
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: "Acme Style Co"
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/INDEX.md" 2>err.txt; grep -q 'Acme Style Co' INDEX.md && echo title_present 1>&2
